nouns.summary: The speaker says he has told these things so that the listeners may have peace in him. Peace is presented as something the listeners are able to possess as a result of what is spoken.

The speaker states that, in the world, the listeners have tribulation. He also declares that he has already conquered the world, linking the listeners’ experience in the world with his victory over it.
The speaker declares that the listeners have tribulation in the world. This noun describes a condition that the listeners are currently experiencing as part of their life in the world.
